subcodes.first_line: O my God! This servant hath been enraptured by the fragrances of holiness and enkindled by the blazing fire [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی هذا عبد انجذب بنفحات القدس و توقد بالنار الملتهبة فى
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @prayer for forgiveness
